params.name: The Principia
params.description:
On Aug 12, 1687 AD, the Principia was published in England.
After discovering universal gravitation about 20 years later, Newton, at the suggestion of Halley, compiled the Principia. In this book, Newton explored the role of forces in various phenomena of motion, proposed the three laws of motion and the law of universal gravitation, and proved them mathematically. This work clarified the mechanic system proposed by Newton and laid the foundation for the development of physics in the future.
